summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 PRs. No GitHub mutations are recommended. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling; already-closed non-security PRs are kept closed; open non-security PRs are classified without close, merge, or fix actions because this shard has no shared canonical and mutation/fix/merge actions are blocked.
